rulings.Case Title: ALFREDO G GAMAD et al VS. DELIA SORIBEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Amended) Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Setting Aside Order Awarding Deft'S Costs And Attorneys' Fees On Appeal;
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 10, 2007, LINE 1. PLAINTIFF ALFREDO GAMAD, FELICIDAD GAMAD AND ALFREDO GAMAD'S (Amended) Motion For Order Setting Aside Order Awarding Deft'S Costs And Attorneys' Fees On Appeal IS GRANTED AS TO THE NOV. 3, 2006 ORDER. COURT AWARDS OPPOSING COUNSEL REASONABLE FEES AND COSTS OF $875.00. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: VENTURE STRATEGY MANAGEMENT COMPANY III, LLC, A et al VS. MATTHEW E. CRISP et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 10, 2007, LINE 2. CROSS DEFENDANT VENTURE STRATEGY MANAGEMENT COMPANY II, LLC, JOANNA REES-GALLANTER, VENTURE STRATERGY GROUP LLC, DBA VSP CAPITAL, VENTURE STRATEGY MANAGEMENT COMPANY III LLC, JOHN HAMM'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS TO FIRST, SECOND, THIRD, SEVENTH, EIGHTH, NINTH, TENTH AND FOURTEENTH CAUSES OF ACTION, WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. OVERRULE DEMURRER TO THE FOURTH AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION. SUSTAIN DEMURRER TO THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION, WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO SPECIFY EXISTING ECONOMIC RELATIONSHIPS. SUSTAIN DEMURRER TO THE THIRTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO INDICATE WHICH CAUSES OF ACTION CROSS-DEFENDANT ENGAGED IN A CONSPIRACY TO COMMIT. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: VENTURE STRATEGY MANAGEMENT COMPANY III, LLC, A et al VS. MATTHEW E. CRISP et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 10, 2007, LINE 2. CROSS DEFENDANTS JOANNA REES-GALLANTER AND JOHN HAMM'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT. COURT GRANTS, IN PART, THE MOTION TO STRIKE: STRIKE "AND PROFITS" FROM PARAGRAPH 117 AND "DISGORGEMENT" FROM PARAGRAPH 118. DENY MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO PAGE 51, LINES 3-5. =(302/PJM/AP)
